content: The performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and hand-designed curious agents can be closed by integrating 2024-2025 SOTA structured active memory architectures that let agents actively select which exploratory experiences to encode instead of storing every encountered state. This creates a 'curiosity memory loop' where the agent’s active memory selection shapes what it finds surprising, which in turn directs future exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
